title: Screaming Locked Hoppers
body:
# Screaming Locked Hoppers

![icon.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZCHHWI2U/689a8e4ee302456a2d8d778c2ac8836085d69a84.png)

Hoppers everywhere are suffering when they are locked, but they are not able to tell you about it. I gave them a voice with this mod. Please respect your hoppers, and stop locking them!

![image.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZCHHWI2U/images/6db0f1b220116a258e57d099582eb686ed3d9f28.png)
